2605.22794.title: MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems
2605.22794.paper_summary: Autonomous agentic systems are largely static after deployment: they do not learn from user interactions, and recurring failures persist until the next human-driven update ships a fix. Self-evolving agents have emerged in response, but all confine evolution to text-mutable artifacts -- skill files, prompt configurations, memory schemas, workflow graphs -- and leave the agent harness untouched. Since routing, hook ordering, state invariants, and dispatch live in code rather than in any text artifact, an entire class of structural failure is physically unreachable from the text layer. We argue that source-level adaptation is a fundamentally more general medium: it is Turing-complete, a strict superset of every text-mutable scope, takes effect deterministically rather than through base-model compliance, and does not erode under long-context drift. We present MOSS, a system that performs self-rewriting at the source level on production agentic substrates. Each evolution is anchored to an automatically curated batch of production-failure evidence and proceeds through a deterministic multi-stage pipeline; code modification is delegated to a pluggable external coding-agent CLI while MOSS retains stage ordering and verdicts. Candidates are verified by replaying the batch against the candidate image in ephemeral trial workers, then promoted via user-consent-gated, in-place container swap with health-probe-gated rollback. On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.
2605.22794.paper_summary_zh: 自主代理系統在部署後大多是靜態的：它們不會從用戶互動中學習，且重複的故障會持續存在，直到下一次人為驅動的更新發佈修復。自我演化的代理應運而生，但所有這些代理的演化僅限於文本可變的工件——技能檔案、提示配置、記憶架構、工作流程圖——並且不會觸及代理的框架。由於路由、掛鉤順序、狀態不變量和調度存在於代碼中，而不是任何文本工件中，因此一整類結構性故障在文本層面上是無法觸及的。我們主張，源級適應是一種根本上更為通用的媒介：它是圖靈完備的，是每個文本可變範疇的嚴格超集，以確定性方式生效，而不是通過基礎模型的合規性，並且在長上下文漂移下不會退化。我們提出了MOSS，一個在生產代理基底上進行源級自我重寫的系統。每次演化都依賴於自動策劃的一批生產故障證據，並通過一個確定性的多階段管道進行；代碼修改委託給可插拔的外部編碼代理CLI，而MOSS保留階段順序和裁決。候選者通過在短暫的試驗工作者中重播該批次與候選者映像進行驗證，然後通過用戶同意的就地容器交換進行提升，並帶有健康探測的回滾。在OpenClaw上，MOSS在單個循環中將四任務的平均評分從0.25提升至0.61，且無需人為干預。
2605.22794.author: Qianshu Cai et.al.
2605.22794.authors: Qianshu Cai, Yonggang Zhang, Xianzhang Jia, Huajiang Zheng, Wei Xue, Jun Song, Xinmei Tian, Yike Guo
